title: Hand-Off Shooting Drill
purpose: Practice shooting after receiving a hand-off while moving.
instructions: Player starts near the top of the key.

title: 23 Cones Shooting Drill
purpose: Competitive shooting drill that creates pressure situations.
instructions: Place 23 cones at the opposite baseline.
Players shoot and sprint to the other end after a make.
A made shot earns a cone for the team.

title: Pressure Jump Shots
purpose: Practice making jump shots while under mental pressure.
instructions: Four lines form at the elbows.
Players must make two shots from each elbow.
Missed shots require repeating the attempt.

title: Speed Shooting Drill
instructions: Players sprint down the court with the ball.
Rebound and sprint back for another shot.

title: Off-the-Dribble Form Shooting
purpose: Develop correct footwork when shooting off the dribble.

title: Weave Layups
purpose: Practice fast break layups and passing.
instructions: Three players weave from half court.

title: Screen Shooting
purpose: Practice scoring after using an off-ball screen.

title: 30 and 1 Shooting Drill
purpose: Shooting from multiple spots under competition.
instructions: Teams must make 10 shots from block, 10 from elbow, and 10 from 3-point line.

title: Chase Down Layups
purpose: Practice finishing while being chased by defenders.

title: 5 Spot Variety Shooting
purpose: Practice multiple types of shots from different spots.
instructions: Players take four different shots at each spot.

title: Drive and Kick Shooting
purpose: Practice shooting after a teammate drives and passes.

title: Titan Shooting
instructions: Three lines at free throw area.
Run to another line before next shot.

title: Rainbow Shooting
purpose: Warm-up drill with shooting from many spots.
instructions: Players rotate shooting from multiple spots.

title: 31 Shooting Drill
instructions: Each player takes one 3-point shot, one mid-range shot, and one inside shot.
